title: Donkey Kong Country
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A single mine cart racing along a broken jungle track in a dense jungle ravine with wooden rails, deep foliage, and a bright gap ahead, caught one beat before the cart launches over a broken section.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- wild, kinetic, jungle

Composition:
- single mine cart only, one clear rail path, layered jungle depth, and no character crowding the frame
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Kong likeness, avoid official barrel logos, avoid exact cart sprite shapes, avoid franchise lettering, avoid resemblance to donkey kong. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Kong likeness, avoid official barrel logos, avoid exact cart sprite shapes, avoid franchise lettering, avoid resemblance to donkey kong
revised_prompt: Create an original image capturing the essence of a retro platform-style video game. Envisage a sole mine cart on the verge of leaping over a broken section of a wooden track in the heart of a dense, wild jungle. Highlight the striking silhouette and visual clarity of the cart against the rich palette of deep green foliage. Drawing inspiration from SNES aesthetics, render the image in soft gradients with a limited color palette, evoking a high-clarity, modern interpretation of a kinetic pixel art style. Subtle layered depths of the jungle, natural lighting piercing through gaps, and a hint of an upcoming leap in the cart's journey should contribute to the suspense. Note: Steer clear from replicating any specific game assets, characters, logos or designs, and maintain the image free of text or watermarks.
